top_signals.title: Sunshine Silver Raises $270 Million in US IPO to Restart Mine
top_signals.summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. raised $270 million in a US initial public offering that priced at the low end of the marketed range, with the funds expected to be used for restarting production at an Idaho mine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Open Book Review of Northern Ireland Executive Budget
top_signals.summary: Review into Northern Ireland Executive Finances presenting options for the Executive to consider to put finances on sustainable footing.

top_signals.title: Financial services contributed a tenth of UK economic output in 2025
top_signals.summary: The financial services sector contributed over a tenth of the UK’s economic output in the last year as the industry’s productivity outpaced average momentum.  The industry provided a £290bn boost to the UK’s real GDP – a macroeconomic measure that adjusts the value of economic output for inflation – in 2025 marking around 11 per [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
